name: browser-backed-api-poc
description: Team trial package for the browser-backed risk platform access service.

scripts.test:mock: echo "Mock tests are run in the source repository before packaging."
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/service.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/actions.js && node --check src/browser.js && node --check src/authState.js && node --check src/originRegistry.js && node --check src/diagnostics.js && node --check scripts/open-profile.js && node --check scripts/refresh-profile.js && node --check scripts/refresh-daemon.js && node --check scripts/mac-worker.js
